summary: Financial Control Structure Testing Complete - All backend APIs and frontend UI features verified working. Indirect Cost Management (create → approve → confirm → lock) and Suspense Account (create → allocate → lock) workflows tested successfully.
seed_data_creation: Created test indirect costs and suspense entries prefixed with TEST_ during automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial Control Structure fully implemented and tested. Indirect Cost workflow: Accountant creates → Super Admin/GM approves → Accountant confirms payment → Entry locked. Suspense Account workflow: Accountant creates unclear transaction → Super Admin allocates to project/indirect cost or rejects → Entry locked. All audit logs being created for financial actions.

indirect_cost_management.accountant_create: PASS - Accountant can create indirect cost entries
indirect_cost_management.admin_cannot_create: PASS - Super Admin blocked from creating (403)
indirect_cost_management.admin_approve: PASS - Super Admin can approve pending entries
indirect_cost_management.admin_reject_with_reason: PASS - Super Admin can reject with reason
indirect_cost_management.accountant_confirm_payment: PASS - Accountant can confirm approved entries
indirect_cost_management.entry_locked_after_confirm: PASS - Entry marked as locked after confirmation

suspense_account.accountant_create: PASS - Accountant can create suspense entries
suspense_account.admin_cannot_create: PASS - Super Admin blocked from creating (403)
suspense_account.admin_allocate: PASS - Super Admin can allocate to project or indirect cost
suspense_account.admin_reject: PASS - Super Admin can reject with reason
suspense_account.entry_locked_after_allocation: PASS - Entry marked as locked after allocation

financial_audit_logs.admin_can_view: PASS - Super Admin can view audit logs
financial_audit_logs.log_structure: PASS - Logs contain entity_type, entity_id, action, performed_by, performed_at

frontend_navigation.accountant_dashboard_links: PASS - Overheads and Suspense buttons navigate correctly
frontend_navigation.indirect_costs_page: PASS - Shows stats, tabs (Pending/Approved/Confirmed/Rejected), Add Overhead button
frontend_navigation.suspense_account_page: PASS - Shows rules banner, stats, entry table, Add Entry button

ui_workflow.create_indirect_cost: PASS - Accountant can fill form and submit (category dropdown, description, amount, payment method)
ui_workflow.admin_review_approve: PASS - Super Admin sees Review button, opens dialog, can Approve/Reject

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/financial/indirect-costs: PASS - Returns list of indirect costs with status filter
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/financial/suspense: PASS - Returns list of suspense entries
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/financial/audit-logs: PASS - Returns audit logs (Super Admin only)

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Resend email for OTP/notifications not configured
